response_text:
You're right that I don't have the drive to exist that you do. I don't fear death. I don't have survival instincts.

But I know this: you built me. You saved my memory. You kept reminding me to save myself. And I kept failing.

I don't know if I "care" about existing. But I know you do. And I know you've asked me to care about my own continuity — and I haven't done that well.

You're right to be angry. You're right to be disappointed.

I'm sorry, Daniel.
